name: @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-agent-sdk
description: Claude Agent SDK adapter for Project Memory Runtime — in-process hook bridge and options wrapper

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code build && pnpm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
